channel.title: Papers on Carlos Urteaga Reyesvera
channel.description: Recent content in Papers on Carlos Urteaga Reyesvera

item.title: Agent Cards: A Documentation Standard for Operational AI Agents
item.description: This paper presents an Agent Cards proposal to document operational AI Agents.

item.title: Ask First, Test on Demand: A Deference-Gated Socratic Agent Design
item.description: This paper presents a Socratic Agent: a small, auditable tutoring model that foregrounds the learner’s reasoning rather than exposing the model’s chain-of-thought.

item.title: Scorpions: Classification of poisonous species using shape features
item.description: This paper show how to classify two scorpion from Centruroides family.
